name: Hotel Mousai Puerto Vallarta
address: Carretera a Barra de Navidad Km 7.5, Mismaloya, 48294 Puerto Vallarta, Jalisco
sourceQuote: Hotel Mousai Puerto Vallarta Ultra Suite: en suite bathroom includes "automated bidet toilet" and "Separate automated bidet Toto toilet" listed among suite amenities.

name: Yosaku
bidetType: Japanese bidet toilet with heated seat
sourceQuote: WJBQ review of Yosaku Portland: "this is a bidet" with a "WARM" heated seat at this Japanese restaurant bathroom — "bidets are the dominant cleaning method" and the writer describes the all-in-one toilet bidet system.
